response:
Alex reads books.
Books bring joy.
Joy fills hearts.
Hearts change views.
Views shift slowly.
Slowly time passes.
Passes days by.
By day one.
One book starts.
Starts with love.
Love challenges minds.
Minds grow wider.
Wider paths open.
Open new doors.
Doors lead far.
Far beyond limits.
Limits break down.
Down comes fear.
Fear turns hope.
Hope guides steps.
Steps count pages.
Pages hold stories.
Stories teach much.
Much is learned.
Learned from text.
Text reveals truth.
Truth sets free.
Free spirits roam.
Roam through words.
Words paint scenes.
Scenes show life.
Life needs change.
Change brings growth.
Growth needs time.
